title: Notable Changes from Rebuild to the Actual Movie
display_title: Notable Changes from Rebuild to the Actual Movie
wikitext:
[]: Notable Changes from Rebuild to the Actual Movie [Spoilers]             Quote Post by NAveryW » Fri Jun 04, 2010 3:21 pm And by "significant" I mean things that are actually worth discussing, not "they redrew Zeruel's nipples to be perkier in this shot". For example, some things previously brought up in the "Interesting little details" thread before its demise: Ridiculously overt imagery which was eventually changed to somewhat less overt imagery... A nervous system coming out of Unit 01's back that was later moved to inside her torso. Was it always intended to be in the torso, drawn separately for the sake of clarity? I'm not going to bother with the image of Shinji colored like Rei. You've seen that already, right? It was some staff member's idea of a joke, right?

[]: Re: Significant Changes between Rebuild and the Actual Movie             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Jun 04, 2010 3:31 pm NAveryW wrote: It was some staff member's idea of a joke, right?

[]:             Quote Post by Gib » Fri Jun 04, 2010 3:33 pm Where is that image?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Jun 04, 2010 5:23 pm Gib wrote: Where is that image?

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Fri Jun 04, 2010 7:33 pm Mr. Tines wrote: http://img203.imageshack.us/img203/2440/vlcsnap2010060200h58m25.png

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jun 04, 2010 7:50 pm "Dummy" is apparently industry shorthand for rough sketches of things, from what I understand at least. (If I'm wrong, somebody correct me.)

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Fri Jun 04, 2010 8:21 pm The word "dummy" is all over the place in the Rebuild sketches. Don't read too much into it.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Fri Jun 04, 2010 9:14 pm Thanks for correcting me on the "Dummy" part.

[]:             Quote Post by megiddoryu » Sat Jun 05, 2010 3:19 am Hi, this is my first post here, but I've been lurking for awhile now. Sahaquiel still has those "angels", they are on the middle section on its back. I think the 2.02 special is just showing how they might deploy.

Article: Notable Changes from Rebuild to the Actual Movie
[]: Notable Changes from Rebuild to the Actual Movie [Spoilers]             Quote Post by NAveryW » Fri Jun 04, 2010 3:21 pm And by "significant" I mean things that are actually worth discussing, not "they redrew Zeruel's nipples to be perkier in this shot". For example, some things previously brought up in the "Interesting little details" thread before its demise: Ridiculously overt imagery which was eventually changed to somewhat less overt imagery... A nervous system coming out of Unit 01's back that was later moved to inside her torso. Was it always intended to be in the torso, drawn separately for the sake of clarity? I'm not going to bother with the image of Shinji colored like Rei. You've seen that already, right? It was some staff member's idea of a joke, right?
